planner_blocker: AGENCY_AUTONOMY_API_KEY or OPENCLAW_WEBHOOK_SECRET missing in heartbeat shell; protected website-workflow planner returns Unauthorized without runtime auth.
requirements_to_mirror: Preserve factual business data: address, phone, hours, emails, chef/owner Dave Perlick, private-event capacities, menu categories, Toast/GiftRocker links.
Verify OpenTable before making it primary; preserve phone fallback.
Use clean delivery links only; do not ship safelinks-wrapped DoorDash/Uber Eats URLs.
Do not publish direct review quotes or staff names without restaurant approval.
Mobile sticky CTA bar required: Reserve, Call, Menu, Directions.
Final QA must include desktop/mobile screenshots, reservation path, menu readability, private-event CTA, order/gift paths, factual accuracy, accessibility labels.
recommended_next_action: When agency auth is available, call the protected Mission Control website-workflow provisioning route for Region Kitchen and Bar and attach these artifact paths to the root/child workflow tasks before any build/fork work starts.
